case.title: JOHN J. CASALE, INC., v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h4: JOHN J. CASALE, INC., v. UNITED STATES, (1962)
JOHN J. CASALE, INC., v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE SOUTHERN DISTRICT OF NEW YORK. No. 483. Decided December 17, 1962.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Loevinger, Lionel Kestenbaum and Robert W. Ginnane for the United States et al.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
CLARK v. LOUISIANA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF LOUISIANA. No. 626, Misc. Decided December 17, 1962.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
